name: Thai Noodle Salad
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------THAI DRESSING-------------------------------
1/4 cup unsalted peanuts
3 tablespoons ginger, minced
1/4 cup lemon or lime juice
1/4 cup water
2 tablespoons soy sauce
1 tablespoon sugar
1 tablespoon vegetable oil
1 teaspoon sesame oil
1/4 teaspoon hot pepper flakes
Prepare noodles according to package directions or cook in boiling water for 3 minutes or until tender. Drain and rinse under cold running water; drain again.
In a salad bowl, toss noodles with spinach and red pepper.
Thai Dressing: In a food processor or blender, process peanuts and ginger until finely chopped. Add lemon juice, water, soy sauce, sugar, vegetable oil, and hot pepper flakes; process to mix.
Pour dressing over noodle mixture; toss to combine. Sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
